metadata.description: This individual appears to be a male in his 40s. He has an olive skin tone with some visible fine lines around the eyes and forehead. His face is oval with a defined jawline. His hair is dark brown, medium length, and very curly, with a receding hairline visible at the temples. His eyes are a striking light blue, almond-shaped, and set slightly wide apart. His eyebrows are thick and dark, with a natural, slightly arched shape. His nose is straight with a rounded tip. His lips are medium thickness with a well-defined cupid's bow. He has a full beard and mustache, dark brown with significant graying, especially around the chin and jawline. His features suggest a Mediterranean or Middle Eastern background. He has a subtle, pleasant smile and is looking directly forward with his head held straight.
